_comment: Known GTA San Andreas gta_sa.exe versions. The wizard computes the SHA-1 hash of the user's exe and looks it up here. If the hash is unknown, it falls back to file-size detection. Add real hashes here as you collect them — see https://gtaforums.com/topic/931236-san-andreas-exe-versions/ for a community-maintained list.
_format: Each entry has: id, label, region, version_string, file_size_bytes, sha1 (lowercase hex, or null if unknown), mod_compatible (bool), needs_downgrade (bool), source (where this build comes from).

versions.label: v1.0 US (HOODLUM No-CD)
versions.notes: Most widely compatible exe for SA mods. This is what the installer recommends.

versions.label: v1.0 EU (HOODLUM No-CD)
versions.notes: EU equivalent of the US HOODLUM build. Also fully mod-compatible.

versions.label: v1.01 US (Hot Coffee patch)
versions.notes: v1.01 patched exe. Most mods work but a few require v1.0 specifically.

versions.label: v2.0 US (SecuROM)
versions.notes: SecuROM-protected exe. Breaks most ASI loaders and CLEO. Needs downgrade.

versions.label: v3.0 Steam (Compact)
versions.notes: Steam Compact build. Includes SecuROM + altered memory layout. Must downgrade to v1.0 before modding.

versions.label: v3.0 Steam (Alternate)
versions.notes: Earlier Steam depot. Still requires downgrade.

versions.label: v3.0 Rockstar Launcher
versions.notes: Rockstar launcher version — also requires downgrade to v1.0.

versions.label: v3.0 Steam (2025 depot)
versions.notes: Newer Steam depot build. No PE version info. Must downgrade to v1.0.
